title: Support-ticket triage model
description: Fine-tuned a classifier to route incoming tickets to the right team before a human opens them. Cut average response time by 41%.

title: Internal RAG assistant
description: Retrieval-augmented chatbot over internal docs, answering 1,200+ employee queries a week.

title: Demand forecasting pipeline
description: Replaced a spreadsheet forecast with a scheduled model pipeline feeding inventory decisions. Stockouts down 18%.

title: Defect detection on a production line
description: Trained a lightweight vision model to flag defective parts in real time from factory camera feeds.

title: Resume-to-role matcher
description: Embedding-based search that ranks candidate resumes against open roles for a recruiting team.

title: Model monitoring dashboard
description: Built drift and performance monitoring for five production models, catching two silent failures early.
